name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, manual cross-referencing of policy details causes delayed claim resolutions. We automate claim validation instead of manual claim validation processes.
problem_solved: manual cross-referencing of policy details leads to coverage issues
